front.title: Server Validation Extension for the Extensible Provisioning Protocol (EPP)

abstract.t: This document describes an Extensible Provisioning Protocol (EPP) extension for providing the status of server validations. Server validations can be done for an extensible set of types, with examples including validating the DNS resolution with the type "dns" and validating the DNSSEC with the type "dnssec". The validations can be performed synchronously that will include the extension in the response or asynchronously that will include the validation in a poll message. If validations are performed on a schedule, a change in the status of a typed-validation will be included in a poll message.
